exercises.title: OpenSSL PQC Configuration Generator
exercises.description: Build a tool to generate OpenSSL configuration for PQC.
tasks: Generate ssl section with PQC groups
hints: Use hybrid groups first for compatibility
Include both KEM and signature algorithms

exercises.title: PKI Transition Planner
exercises.description: Create a PKI transition planning tool.
exercises.expectedOutput: PKI transition planning and tracking tool
hints: Plan offline ceremony for root CA

exercises.title: Network Component Analyzer
exercises.description: Build a network component PQC readiness analyzer.
hints: Include load balancers, WAFs, VPNs, proxies

exercises.title: TLS Handshake Tester
exercises.description: Create a TLS handshake testing tool for PQC validation.
tasks: Test connection with specific key exchange groups
exercises.expectedOutput: TLS handshake testing tool for PQC
hints: Use subprocess to call openssl s_client
